narrative:
Huber Heights 6-C (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,099 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.9 percentage points.
